summary: Iteration 13: Visual Report Generation feature tested successfully. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='report' returns structured slides_data with sections containing title, bullets, imageKeyword, visualType, workflowSteps. Frontend correctly imports renderVisualReport and triggers visual report generation with progress toasts when Export is clicked.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay intercepts pointer events requiring force=True for Playwright clicks

passed_tests: 2. Backend: GET /api/sources - 3 indexed sources available (SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck)
3. Backend: POST /api/generate with output_type='report' returns structured slides_data
4. Backend: Report response has 'type'='report', 'slides_data' array, 'theme' field, 'content' fallback
5. Backend: Each report section has required fields: title, bullets, imageKeyword, visualType
6. Backend: Report bullets are concise (under 15 words each)
7. Backend: visualType='workflow' sections include workflowSteps array when applicable
8. Backend: detect_theme function correctly identifies 'health' theme from H@H content
9. Backend: Every section has non-empty imageKeyword for AI image generation
10. Backend: POST /api/generate-image with layout='report' returns compressed JPEG (~50KB)
11. Frontend: App loads correctly with renderVisualReport import (line 5 in NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx)
12. Frontend: Research Report tool visible in Studio panel
13. Frontend: Generate report from Studio creates output with slides_data
14. Frontend: Report output card shows in Generated Outputs (5 outputs visible)
15. Frontend: Report preview modal displays structured sections with bullet points
16. Frontend: Click Export triggers renderVisualReport function
17. Frontend: Progress toast shows 'Generating 7 report images — please wait...'
18. Frontend: Sequential progress toasts (Image 1/7, Image 2/7, ..., Image 7/7)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (line 645-722): generate_report function correctly returns structured JSON with slides_data containing title, bullets, imageKeyword, visualType, workflowSteps
server.py (line 518-530): detect_theme function shared across slides, reports, infographics - identifies health content correctly
server.py (line 655-684): Report prompt specifies concise bullets (max 15 words), workflow sections with steps, and imageKeyword for each section
reportRenderer.js (line 34-69): renderVisualReport generates AI images for up to 7 sections with progress toasts
reportRenderer.js (line 48-63): fetch call to /api/generate-image includes imageKeyword from section
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 5): renderVisualReport correctly imported from utils/reportRenderer
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 1404-1411): Export handler calls renderVisualReport for report type with slides_data
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck (Health Intelligence Workspace)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual report feature fully tested. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='report' returns structured slides_data with 6-8 sections, each containing title, bullets (concise), imageKeyword, visualType, workflowSteps. The detect_theme function identifies health content. Frontend renderVisualReport (in /app/frontend/src/utils/reportRenderer.js) generates AI images sequentially (up to 7) showing progress toasts (Image X/Y), then renders Canvas with section cards (image left, bullets right) and exports as PNG. Export takes ~60-90 seconds for full report with 7 images.

verified_features.structured_slides_data: Working - Report returns slides_data array with sections
verified_features.section_fields: Working - Each section has title, bullets, imageKeyword, visualType, workflowSteps
verified_features.concise_bullets: Working - Bullets are under 15 words each
verified_features.workflow_sections: Working - visualType='workflow' sections include workflowSteps array
verified_features.imageKeyword_per_section: Working - Every section has contextual imageKeyword (2-4 word phrase)
verified_features.detect_theme: Working - Identifies 'health' theme for H@H content
verified_features.frontend_import: Working - renderVisualReport imported in NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx line 5
verified_features.export_handler: Working - Line 1404-1411 calls renderVisualReport for report type
verified_features.progress_toasts: Working - Shows 'Generating X report images' and sequential progress (Image 1/7, etc.)
verified_features.image_generation_api: Working - /api/generate-image with layout='report' returns compressed JPEG
